metadata.homeTitle: David Gómez | Senior Fullstack Mobile & Web Developer
metadata.homeDescription: Senior Fullstack Mobile & Web Developer specializing in high-performance React Native architectures and robust Node.js backends.

home.heroTagline: Building Mobile Apps Used by Millions.
home.heroDescription: Senior Fullstack Mobile & Web Developer specializing in React Native and Native iOS architectures, backed by Node.js backends for the financial and healthcare sectors.
home.philosophyTitle: Code is the starting point; scalability and team leadership are the differentiators.
home.philosophyP1Start: With over 6 years of experience, I contribute to and lead development teams throughout the full lifecycle of high-impact mobile products. My approach centers on
home.philosophyP2: I serve as the bridge between technical execution and business goals — from architecture decisions and state management to API design and team coordination — always focused on delivering solutions that stand up at scale.
home.project1Desc: React Native developer for one of Paraguay's most used fintech apps. Developing and maintaining high-quality features for an electronic wallet with over 1 million active users, with a strong focus on performance and scalability.
home.project2Desc: Contributed to the development of Conti Móvil, Paraguay's leading mobile banking app, and Continental Banca Empresas for corporate clients. Shipped new features and resolved front-end issues under Scrum methodology.
home.role1Title: React Native Developer Sr. — Billetera Mango
home.role1Desc: Developing and maintaining new features for Paraguay's leading electronic wallet. Collaborating within a team focused on high-quality UX, performance optimization, and scalability.
home.role1Item1: Contributing to a platform serving over 1 million active users.
home.role1Item2: Focused on performance, code quality, and scalable architecture with React Native, TypeScript, Redux, Sentry, OneSignal, and Rive.
home.role2Title: React Native Developer — Banco Continental SAECA
home.role2Desc: Worked on two major banking apps: Conti Móvil (retail) and Continental Banca Empresas (corporate). Shipped features and resolved issues ensuring a seamless banking experience for hundreds of thousands of users.
home.role2Item1: Contributed to Conti Móvil, a mobile banking app with 450,000+ users.
home.role2Item2: Took part in continuous product improvement under Agile/Scrum methodologies.
home.role3Desc: Worked as a Fullstack Developer managing and enhancing the core web system of a radiology clinic, building modules for patient management, billing, and role-based access control.
home.role4Desc: Started my career as a Junior Developer at Sercicronos, a marathon and running event management platform.
home.role5Desc: Sole developer of PadelSys, a padel tournament management platform used across Paraguay. Built the web app and contributed to the mobile app for tournament creation, player registration, bracket generation, and analytics.

about.subtitle: Senior Fullstack Mobile & Web Developer
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a Fullstack Mobile & Web Developer with over 6 years of experience building high-performance applications used by millions of people in Paraguay. I specialize in React Native, TypeScript, and Node.js, with a proven track record in the financial sector.
about.p2: My focus is on delivering clean, scalable, and maintainable code while actively contributing to team growth. I thrive in Scrum environments, leading projects from architecture through delivery — both as an individual contributor and as a team lead.
about.archDesc: I believe in building structures that let teams move fast without piling up unsustainable technical debt. Every module should be as easy to replace as it is to build.
about.precisionDesc: Every technical choice is a business decision. I evaluate library longevity, team familiarity, and performance tradeoffs before committing to an architectural direction.
about.craftDesc: Quality is non-negotiable. I champion clean, expressive codebases, rigorous code reviews, and a culture of continuous improvement.
about.humanDesc: Great apps are built by great teams. I focus on clear communication, well-documented APIs, and reducing cognitive load for everyone involved in the product.
about.mentoringDesc: As project lead for Farmacia Canaria, I directed a distributed team of 3 developers while serving as the sole backend developer — translating client requirements into functional, role-based modules for a telemedicine platform.
about.openSourceDesc: As the sole developer of PadelSys and the Realtec landing page, I managed projects end-to-end: from architecture and stakeholder meetings to deployment and ongoing maintenance.
about.speakingDesc: As the sole developer of PadelSys, I manage the full product lifecycle — from architecture and stakeholder meetings to deployment and maintenance. Complete technical and product ownership of a platform used by padel players across Paraguay.

experience.subtitle: Professional History
experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Over 6 years building high-impact mobile and web products across finance, healthcare, and sports — from banking apps with 450K users to a fintech wallet with over 1 million.
experience.role1Item1: Developing and maintaining new features for an electronic wallet with over 1 million active users.
experience.role1Item2: Collaborating within a Scrum team to deliver high-quality UX with a focus on performance and scalability.
experience.role1Item3: Working with React Native, UIKit, Kotlin, TypeScript, Swift, Redux, OneSignal, Sentry, and Rive.
experience.role2Item1: Contributed to Conti Móvil, Paraguay's mobile banking app with 450,000+ users.
experience.role2Item2: Developed features for Continental Banca Empresas, the bank's corporate client app.
experience.role2Item3: Shipped front-end improvements and bug fixes under Agile/Scrum methodology.
experience.role3Item1: Managed and enhanced the core web system of a radiology clinic.
experience.role3Item2: Built modules for patient management, billing, and role-based access control.
experience.role3Item3: Tech stack: Laravel, Vue.js, Express.js, HTML5, MySQL, PHP.
experience.role4Item1: Developed and maintained a marathon and running event management platform.
experience.role4Item2: Built features for event registration, timing systems, and results publishing.
experience.role4Item3: Tech stack: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL.
experience.role5Item1: Built a padel tournament management platform used across Paraguay.
experience.role5Item2: Developed tournament creation, player registration, bracket generation, and analytics features.
experience.role5Item3: Tech stack: PHP, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap, Chart.js, MySQL.
experience.ctaDesc: Open to senior mobile development roles and freelance consulting opportunities.

contact.title: Available for
